narrative:
Hanover-Combined township has 1,546 registered voters, with 48.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.5 percentage points.
